TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi abstract sealed beforefieldinit ExtensionsOpenAIModelFactory extends System.Object

Docs.summary: A factory class for creating instances of the models for mocking.

Docs.param: The agent that created the item.
The response on which the item is created.
The kind of CSDL action (e.g., 'SetVariable', 'InvokeAzureAgent').

The response on which the item is created.
The status of the memory search tool call. One of `in_progress`, `searching`, `completed`, `incomplete` or `failed`,
The results returned from the memory search.

MemberSignature.Value: public static Azure.AI.Extensions.OpenAI.ProjectConversation ProjectConversation (string id = default, System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary<string,string> metadata = default, DateTimeOffset createdAt = default);

.method public static hidebysig class Azure.AI.Extensions.OpenAI.ProjectConversation ProjectConversation(string id, class System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary`2<string, string> metadata, valuetype System.DateTimeOffset createdAt) cil managed

Public Shared Function ProjectConversation (Optional id As String = Nothing, Optional metadata As IDictionary(Of String, String) = Nothing, Optional createdAt As DateTimeOffset = Nothing) As ProjectConversation
static member ProjectConversation : string * System.Collections.Generic.IDictionary<string, string> * DateTimeOffset -> Azure.AI.Extensions.OpenAI.ProjectConversation

Docs.param: The unique ID of the conversation.

Set of 16 key-value pairs that can be attached to an object. This can be useful for storing additional information about the object in a structured format, and querying for objects via API or the dashboard. Keys are strings with a maximum length of 64 characters. Values are strings with a maximum length of 512 characters.
The time at which the conversation was created, measured in seconds since the Unix epoch.
Docs.summary: The ProjectConversation.

MemberSignature.Value: public static Azure.AI.Extensions.OpenAI.UserProfileMemoryItem UserProfileMemoryItem (string memoryId = default, DateTimeOffset updatedAt = default, string scope = default, string content = default);

.method public static hidebysig class Azure.AI.Extensions.OpenAI.UserProfileMemoryItem UserProfileMemoryItem(string memoryId, valuetype System.DateTimeOffset updatedAt, string scope, string content) cil managed

Public Shared Function UserProfileMemoryItem (Optional memoryId As String = Nothing, Optional updatedAt As DateTimeOffset = Nothing, Optional scope As String = Nothing, Optional content As String = Nothing) As UserProfileMemoryItem
static member UserProfileMemoryItem : string * DateTimeOffset * string * string -> Azure.AI.Extensions.OpenAI.UserProfileMemoryItem

Docs.param: The unique ID of the memory item.
The last update time of the memory item.
The namespace that logically groups and isolates memories, such as a user ID.
The content of the memory.
Docs.summary: A memory item specifically containing user profile information extracted from conversations, such as preferences, interests, and personal details.
